---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve (enterprise template)
---

**Summary**
One-line summary of the bug.

**Severity**
- [ ] P0 (blocker)
- [ ] P1 (critical)
- [ ] P2 (major)
- [ ] P3 (minor)

**Environment**
- Module version: 
- Terraform version: 
- Provider(s) and versions: 
- OS / CI environment:

**Reproduction steps**
Provide a minimal reproducible example (HCL snippet / example) and exact steps to reproduce.

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (include error messages / logs / stack traces).

**Workaround**
If any temporary workaround exists.

**Additional information**
Attach logs, plan output, and any relevant screenshots. Do not include secrets.

**Labels** (maintainers will set as appropriate): bug, severity::P1, area::module
